view.title: Validate explicit UC need #9

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 9 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for social media integration.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for social media integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for social media integration (Instagram, Facebook booking), but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for social media integration, yet lacks specific API endpoints or evidence of successful integration or data flow related to these platforms. Therefore, the requirement cannot be assessed, leading to a blocked status due to inconclusive evidence.
